name: HXT_TM_MTRX
description: This is the table which represents the building blocks of a timecard MTRX row. This doesn't include the additional row attributes.

columns.Name: TM_MTRX_ROW_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: ENTERPRISE_ID

columns.Name: TM_HEADER_ID
columns.Comments: Foriegn key to HXT_TM_HEADER.

columns.Name: BLD_BLK_TYPE
columns.Comments: Whether the timecard MTRX row represents a RANGE or a MEASURE entry.

columns.Name: UNIT_OF_MEASURE
columns.Comments: Denotes the Unit of Measure. Possible values HOURS or DAYS.

columns.Name: DISPLAY_SEQUENCE
columns.Comments: The sequence in which the rows are inserted.

columns.Name: DAILY_COMMENT_HAS_DATA_FLAG
columns.Comments: DAILY_COMMENT_HAS_DATA_FLAG

columns.Name: CALCULATED_FLAG
columns.Comments: This flag indicates whether this matrix row stores processed  data.

columns.Name: TC_START_DATE
columns.Comments: TC_START_DATE

columns.Name: TC_END_DATE
columns.Comments: TC_END_DATE

columns.Name: RESOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: RESOURCE_ID

columns.Name: LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID

columns.Name: BUSINESS_UNIT_ID
columns.Comments: BUSINESS_UNIT_ID

columns.Name: MEASURE1

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
